summary: Tested iteration 86: Film Detail Page and Poster Loading fixes. All major issues fixed - Film detail pages no longer show 'QUALCOSA E ANDATO STORTO' error. Posters load correctly from /api/posters/{filename} static file endpoint. TrendingDown icon import fixed and working.

issues: Some film poster thumbnails appear as empty gray boxes - these are films without generated posters

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All reported issues verified as fixed

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user fandrex1@gmail.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Poster loading refactored from base64 in MongoDB to static files at /app/backend/static/posters/. The posterSrc() helper in frontend components resolves relative URLs (/api/posters/xxx.png) to full URLs. TrendingDown and RotateCcw icons are properly imported in FilmDetail.jsx line 43.

Backend Tests (pytest).test_poster_endpoint_returns_image: PASSED - /api/posters/{filename} returns images with correct content-type
Backend Tests (pytest).test_film_distribution_endpoint: PASSED - Distribution data including trend field works
Backend Tests (pytest).test_dashboard_batch_endpoint: PASSED - Dashboard batch returns all data including featured films with posters
Backend Tests (pytest).test_cineboard_now_playing: PASSED - CineBoard now-playing returns films with poster_url

Frontend Tests (Playwright).login_flow: PASSED - Login with fandrex1@gmail.com/Ciaociao1 works, shows 'Bentornato!' toast
Frontend Tests (Playwright).dashboard_loading: PASSED - Dashboard loads with 22 films, $57.6M revenue, 53% quality
Frontend Tests (Playwright).film_detail_page: PASSED - No 'QUALCOSA E ANDATO STORTO' error, poster loads, IMDb rating displays
Frontend Tests (Playwright).film_distribution_trend: PASSED - TrendingDown icon shows for declining trend (e.g., 'In Calo')
Frontend Tests (Playwright).cineboard_page: PASSED - CineBoard at /social loads with 36 posters visible
Frontend Tests (Playwright).cineboard_to_detail_navigation: PASSED - Clicking film from CineBoard opens detail without errors
Frontend Tests (Playwright).poster_loading_from_static_files: PASSED - Posters load from /api/posters/ endpoint with correct Cache-Control headers

issues_verified_fixed: Film Detail Page error 'QUALCOSA E ANDATO STORTO' - FIXED (was caused by missing TrendingDown/RotateCcw imports)
Slow poster loading - FIXED (base64 data extracted to static files, now served with 1-week cache)
TrendingDown icon missing - FIXED (imported at FilmDetail.jsx line 43)
rca_of_the_issue: The 'QUALCOSA E ANDATO STORTO' error was caused by a React render error when the TrendingDown icon from lucide-react was used but not imported. The fix added the import at line 43 of FilmDetail.jsx. Poster loading was slow because posters were stored as base64 strings in MongoDB documents (up to 2MB each). The fix extracted these to static files and added a new endpoint /api/posters/{filename} that serves them with aggressive caching (Cache-Control: max-age=604800).
